title: genista anglica subsp. silana
intro: Genista anglica subsp. silana, also known as English broom, is a shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its isoflavone content. The health benefits of Genista anglica subsp. silana include its potential to alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and support bone health. Herbal preparations of Genista anglica subsp. silana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
